news.headline: Hong Kong lifts flat resale curbs for Tai Po fire survivors under buy-back plan
news.summary:
The Hong Kong government will lift resale restrictions on replacement homes for flat owners displaced by the Tai Po fire and provide them with two-year vouchers to purchase second-hand subsidised housing, according to an official buy-back document seen by the South China Morning Post on Tuesday.

news.headline: Quantum IPO wave is a milestone. It should also come with a warning
news.summary:
A surge in stock offerings by quantum computing firms suggests 2026 could be a breakout year for technologies still in their early stages of commercial viability.
Investor exuberance is soaring as governments and industry anticipate significant milestones that could transform global power structures
